meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Master Version Control for Students
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no version control' trap. A high-impact, intermediate checklist for students building SaaS apps using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the fear of lost progress by adopting a standardized SaaS starter kit. By integrating Git-based version control, Antigravity for rapid scaffolding, and Claude Code for automated refactoring, you shift from amateur script-writing to professional software engineering, ensuring your portfolio projects remain resilient, scalable, and audit-ready.
content.intro:
The cold sweat of a corrupted project file is a rite of passage for every developer, but continuing without version control is a career-limiting choice. You are currently building in a fragile vacuum where one bad refactor or accidental deletion wipes out weeks of late-night coding sessions. It is time to graduate from 'file_final_v2.js' to a professional engineering workflow.

This guide replaces chaos with structure. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, we integrate version control into your muscle memory. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, you will transform your development environment into a robust engine capable of shipping production-grade code that showcases your skills to future employers.

steps.title: Initialize Repository Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, establish a Git-first environment to track every iteration of your SaaS project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a professional SaaS starter repository with a clean Git structure, .gitignore for Node/Python, and a README template.

steps.title: Automate Environment Configuration
steps.description: Standardize your environment variables and dependencies to ensure your app runs identically on any machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure .env.example file and a Docker configuration for a scalable SaaS environment.

steps.title: Implement Modular Feature Branches
steps.description: Learn to isolate features within branches to prevent breaking changes from affecting your main production line.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branch management workflow strategy for a student project, focusing on feature-based development.

steps.title: Refactor with AI-Assisted Audits
steps.description: Use Claude Code to review your commits and ensure your code follows industry standards before merging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and clean code principles.

steps.title: Deploy with Version Integrity
steps.description: Finalize your build by tagging your release and deploying to a staging environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script that tags the current Git commit and pushes to production.

pro_tips: Commit your code every time you solve a single, distinct sub-task rather than waiting until the end of the day.
Use Semantic Versioning (SemVer) for your tags to track the evolution of your project for recruiters.
Configure a pre-commit hook to automatically run your linter, ensuring bad code never touches your history.
Treat your Git commit messages as documentation for your future self; explain the 'why' not just the 'what'.
Keep your 'main' branch in a deployable state at all times by testing every merge in a temporary preview environment.
resources: Git Best Practices for Students: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your first project is version-controlled, focus on deploying your app to a live hosting provider like Vercel or Railway to complete your end-to-end learning cycle.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build like a senior engineer. Stop losing work and start building a portfolio that commands respect in the industry. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
